title: [FIRRTL] Cleaned up verifiers for connects
body:
Added a separate method, `isTypeLarger`, to check whether a destination
type is larger than an equivalent source type. If this predicate holds
between two types, a `ConnectOp` is used, otherwise a `PartialConnect`
is required to handle the truncation. Both the parser and the verifier
consistently use this function to place and check `ConnectOp`.

Unlike prior checks, the new method deeply traverses vector and bundle
types, which would not have reported a width with `getWidthOrSentinel`.

Further simplified analog type verification and factored out some
common flow checking logic in connects.
